scripts.api:bg: bun run packages/server/src/v2/server.ts --port 7072 &>/tmp/orca-api.log & echo $! > /tmp/orca-api.pid && echo 'API started on :7072'
scripts.api:status: curl -sf http://localhost:7072/health | jq . || echo 'API not running'
scripts.web: cd packages/web && npx webpack serve --mode development
scripts.web:bg: cd packages/web && npx webpack serve --mode development &>/tmp/orca-web.log & echo $! > /tmp/orca-web.pid && echo 'Web started on :8095'
scripts.dev: bun run api:bg && bun run web:bg
scripts.dev:stop: bun run api:stop && bun run web:stop
